heroHeadline: PLA Conducts 15-Sortie Mass ADIZ Crossing Across 4 Sectors; Two Type 055 Destroyers Join Eastern Theater
heroSubtitle: 11 of 15 PLA sorties crossed Taiwan Strait median line into N+C+SW+E ADIZ on March 28 (J-10, J-16, KJ-500); two new Type 055 destroyers assigned to PLA Eastern Theater; defense budget deadlock continues; $14B arms package awaiting May 14–15 Trump-Xi summit
footerNote: Data sourced from Taiwan MND, US DoD, DSCA, CSIS ChinaPower, Global Taiwan Institute, Reuters, AP, Bloomberg, NPR, Taipei Times, Focus Taiwan, Nikkei Asia, and institutional analyses. All claims reflect multi-pole sourcing across Western, East Asian, and international media.
